message:
🐛 Change issue_number type from number to string

GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch input compatibility fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ on:
       issue_number:
         description: 'Issue number to fix'
         required: true
-        type: number
+        type: string
       issue_title:
         description: 'Issue title (optional, for display)'
         required: false
